description: Shared DNS TXT record contract for JACS public-key trust. Go generation and Rust/Python verification must agree on the owner name and jacs_public_key_hash field spelling.
bind_record: _v1.agent.jacs.example.com. 3600 IN TXT "v=hai.ai; jacs_agent_id=agent-123; alg=SHA-256; enc=base64; jacs_public_key_hash=hash-abc"
